sections.title: If the 2021 Halloween event was not completed

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Hello Iffie!

lines.speaker: Iffie
lines.text: Sorry, dearie, if I stop to chat I'll lose count. Talk to my sister instead; she likes to chat. You'll find her upstairs in the church.

sections.title: If the 2021 Halloween event was completed

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Hello Iffie, remember our adventure?

lines.speaker: Iffie
lines.text: Me, forget? Never! I still hear the ringing in my head when I go to sleep sometimes!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: From the rolling pin and saucepan?

lines.speaker: Iffie
lines.text: Yes, it was surprisingly loud doing that.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I don't know if it is that surprising. You were banging a metal saucepan on your head!

lines.speaker: Iffie
lines.text: Hello dearie, of course I remember it!

lines.speaker: Iffie
lines.text: I dream about it sometimes, especially sneaking into the Blue Moon Inn kitchens for the rolling pin and saucepan!

lines.speaker: Iffie
lines.text: Although probably best I don't do that again, I still feel bad for the chef.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Yes, probably best we don't!

lines.speaker: Iffie
lines.text: I don't only remember it, I remember it fondly, I loved it!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: It was a good adventure wasn't it!

lines.speaker: Iffie
lines.text: Yes, very. I'm so happy that you picked me to help you.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I couldn't have picked anyone else, you were the perfect accomplice!

lines.speaker: Iffie
lines.text: Thank you, dearie!

lines.speaker: Iffie
lines.text: Of course dearie! How could I ever forget it? I had such a great time.

lines.speaker: Iffie
lines.text: Are you still adventuring?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I am doing my best to adventure. There are just so many things to do!

lines.speaker: Iffie
lines.text: Well keep it up, don't let an old lady like me distract you. I've had my fill of adventure now!

lines.speaker: Iffie
lines.text: There is no way I could forget it. Thank you for letting me come on such an adventure!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: It was my pleasure, maybe we could do it again some day!

lines.speaker: Iffie
lines.text: That would be lovely dearie, but maybe we go on one that doesn't involve climbing trees?

lines.speaker: Iffie
lines.text: I'm getting a bit old for that!

lines.speaker: Iffie
lines.text: How could I not? It was amazing! I see you're still wearing that jumper I knitted you.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: It's lovely, very versatile. Even keeps me warm in the coldest of places!

lines.speaker: Iffie
lines.text: That is good to hear. Do you have a favourite way to wear it?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I like the orange version the best!

lines.speaker: Iffie
lines.text: I like it too! It reminds me of pumpkins and spooky things, just like our adventure!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I like the black version the best!

lines.speaker: Iffie
lines.text: I like it too! It's pretty scary looking, just like how we saw Death in our adventure!

lines.speaker: Iffie
lines.text: Sorry, dearie, if I stop to chat I'll lose count.
